blocking_violations.message: Deferring AC#5 (in-scope DoD item) to future story is a scope change. Per critical-rules.md rule #9, scope changes require Architecture Decision Records.
affected_items: AC#5: Story-Creation Skill Phase 1 Dependency Question
blocking_violations.remediation: Create ADR-008 documenting scope boundary (template updates vs skill enhancement). Reference in Implementation Notes.
blocking_violations.compliance_rule: critical-rules.md Rule #9: Document All Decisions - Architecture decisions require ADRs

non_blocking_violations.message: AC#5 deferred to 'future story-creation enhancement' but follow-up story not yet created. Risk: Work could be lost if follow-up never materialized (RCA-007).
affected_items: AC#5: Story-Creation Skill Phase 1 Dependency Question
non_blocking_violations.remediation: Create STORY-093 for story-creation skill enhancement with depends_on: ['STORY-090']. Include AC#5 acceptance criteria. Schedule for SPRINT-6.

technical_analysis.blocker_description: AC#5 requires modifications to devforgeai-story-creation skill Phase 1 workflow - external framework component, not internal template logic

approval_conditions.description: Create ADR-008 documenting scope boundary (template updates AC#1-4 vs skill enhancement AC#5)
approval_conditions.alternative: OR obtain explicit user approval via AskUserQuestion accepting deferral risk

approval_conditions.description: Create STORY-093 (story-creation skill enhancement) with depends_on: ['STORY-090'] to implement AC#5
approval_conditions.alternative: Document user commitment to create follow-up story in Implementation Notes

chain_analysis.rca_007_applicability: YES - but current chain differs from RCA-007 scenario
chain_analysis.rca_007_assessment: AC#5 deferred to separate story-creation enhancement (STORY-093), not lost in worktree/test-isolation chain

story_strength.description: 5 of 7 ACs fully implemented (template updates). Deferred AC#5 is skill enhancement (separate concern). Story delivers depends_on field infrastructure for EPIC-010 parallel development.

qa_decision_required.question: Approve STORY-090 with conditional remediation plan?
qa_decision_required.option_a: CREATE ADR-008 now, approve immediately (governance compliant)
qa_decision_required.option_b: USER APPROVAL: Accept deferral with commitment to create STORY-093 (user-approved deferral)
qa_decision_required.option_c: REJECT: Wait for ADR-008 AND STORY-093 to exist before approval (conservative approach)

recommendation: OPTION A (CREATE ADR-008): Approve immediately after ADR-008 is created. Schedule STORY-093 for next sprint. This unblocks parallel development (EPIC-010) while maintaining governance compliance.
